summary: Backend 38/38 tests pass (21 regression + 17 new for match/chat/report-block/razorpay-link). Frontend: Match screen (prefs, start, cancel, online-count), Chat tab empty state, Chat[peer] (send/video/menu Report/Block), Privacy, Terms, Blocked, Report (8 reasons + textarea + submit), Profile (Privacy/Terms/Blocked rows) all render correctly. TWO critical issues: (1) Store has no 'Quick Pay via Razorpay link' purple button in JSX even though openPaymentLink() helper & paymentLink state exist — button simply isn't rendered. (2) Call screen shows 'Call failed – Missing auth token' on hard navigation in Expo web preview because the auth store isn't persisted across full page reloads (web only; native is fine). This blocks web-testing of call-report-btn.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: 'Quick Pay via Razorpay link' purple button is MISSING from JSX. openPaymentLink() function exists (line 33) and paymentLink state is fetched from /api/packs, but no <TouchableOpacity testID="razorpay-quickpay-btn" onPress={openPaymentLink}> is rendered. Users cannot access the rzp.io/rzp/K0Un9AY fallback at all.
The 'Blocked users' row correctly navigates to /blocked and shows 'Blocked users' label, but its testID is still the legacy 'row-community'. Rename to 'row-blocked' for clarity/spec alignment.

integration_issues.flow: Auth persistence on web (full page reload)
integration_issues.issue: After login, hard-navigating (url change / reload) loses the auth state — /api calls then return 401 and /call/[channel] renders 'Call failed – Missing auth token'. Native apps won't hit this since SPA navigation retains state, but it breaks the Expo web preview and also prevents deep-linking into /chat/[peer] or /call/[channel]. Fix: persist auth token via zustand/persist + AsyncStorage (or localStorage on web).

action_items: Add the purple 'Quick Pay via Razorpay link' TouchableOpacity in store.tsx (testID='razorpay-quickpay-btn') that calls openPaymentLink(); render it conditionally when paymentLink is set.
Rename profile 'Blocked users' row testID from 'row-community' to 'row-blocked' for spec alignment.

Persist auth token across reloads on web (zustand persist middleware or AsyncStorage on native + localStorage on web) so /call/[channel] and other deep links work after full reload and in QA automation.
critical_code_review_comments: store.tsx line 33-45: openPaymentLink() is defined but dead code — no caller/button. Either render a button or delete the function.

Auth store on web: route guard appears to keep user 'logged in' only for SPA transitions; after goto/reload, token is gone and all /api calls return 401. This is why the call screen and post-reload chat tests fail in web preview.
server.py end_call still uses raw dict instead of Pydantic (carry-over from previous iteration).
match_queue is in-memory; noted as intentional for MVP. For multi-pod production, move to Redis with TTL.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_endpoints.py (updated explore test to include auth and add 401 case)

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — 11 of 13 flows verified; 2 spec misses (Quick Pay button missing, call-report-btn unreachable due to auth non-persistence on web)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests register TEST_<uuid>@example.com users (boy/girl) and build chats/blocks between them. Frontend tested with aman.boy@test.com / pass1234.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints work: /packs returns razorpay_payment_link, /match/join+status+cancel+clear+online-count pair correctly by gender preference, /chat/send+messages+conversations, /report, /block+unblock+blocked, and chat to blocked user returns 403 + explore excludes blocked. Key testIDs on frontend: match→[pref-any,pref-boy,pref-girl,start-match-btn,cancel-match-btn,online-count,match-coins-pill]; chat/[peer]→[chat-back-btn,chat-video-btn,chat-menu-btn,menu-report-btn,menu-block-btn,chat-text-input,chat-send-btn]; profile→[row-privacy,row-terms,row-community(renders 'Blocked users'→/blocked)]; report→[reason-1..reason-8 (selector: [data-testid^=reason-] count=8), report-submit-btn]; store missing razorpay-quickpay-btn. On web preview, zustand auth state is NOT persisted; hard-nav (goto or reload) loses token so use SPA click-navigation in Playwright or register+login inline via fetch to get token.
rca_of_issue: (1) Missing Quick Pay button: the refactor that added paymentLink fetching forgot to add the corresponding <TouchableOpacity> block to the JSX tree after line 67. (2) Call failed / chat send 401 after navigation: auth store does not use zustand/persist, so state only lives in memory; Playwright's page.goto triggers a full reload that clears the store, after which api() sends requests without Authorization header → 401s. Both are pure frontend fixes.
